rows.label: qev016501_MSG0001
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! You came at a good time. I had
a job I wanted to ask you to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Due to the fierce battles lately,
both the Dolls and the BLADEs'
equipment are battered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0003
rows.name:
We want to perform large-scale maintenance,
but we are completely lacking the rare
resource required for repairs[ST:wide ]— Aurora Stone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0004
rows.name:
You understand what it means to go on
missions in this dangerous Mira with
inadequate equipment, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Nod, saying it's akin to
throwing one's life away.

rows.label: qev016501_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev016501_SEL0021
rows.name:
State that equipment doesn't
matter if you have the skill.

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Having survived numerous life-or-death
situations, that fear must have
sunk deep into your bones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0006
rows.name:
You talk big. But, not all BLADEs
are combat specialists like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0007
rows.name:
There are many people who used
to be regular civilians. Not
everyone can fight like you do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0008
rows.name:
So, Pathfinders and Landbanks are running around,
but going out with inadequate equipment just results
in casualties, creating a vicious cycle...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Listen, I need you to gather enough Aurora Stone
for the equipment maintenance, and Ion Thruster
HI9s, which can be found in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Also, could you recover the Data
Unit that fell there as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thanks for accepting it.
You're a lifesaver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Believing in your safe return,
I'll go ahead and set up the
arrangements for the maintenance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0013
rows.name:
Mine a lot of rare resources and[ST:wide ]— make
absolutely sure you come back alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0014
rows.name: ...Listen, this is an order. Understood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Rare resources can only be
obtained from Mining Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you only have Research Data Probes
or other Data Probes installed, you
might want to swap them out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Well, you're not an amateur at
Frontier Net anymore either, so
I'll leave the method up to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0018
rows.name:
As expected. With that much
Aurora Stone, we can fully
maintain the BLADEs' equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0019
rows.name:
All that's left is the mission in
Nightglow Forest. Do your best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Thank you. It seems you've
accomplished all the missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0021
rows.name:
The broken Dolls and equipment will
surely be usable in actual combat again
with the materials you gathered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'll also send the Data Unit you
found for analysis immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_JNK0030
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev016501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask what exactly the Data Unit is about.

rows.label: qev016501_JNK0040
rows.name: Indifference

rows.label: qev016501_SEL0041
rows.name: Demand to be handed the reward quickly.

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'm sorry... This was considered
highly classified within a certain
project I was involved in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0024
rows.name:
I can't tell outsiders. However,
if I could say just one thing[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0025
rows.name:
"Irreplaceable bonds with comrades."
That is what this Data Unit is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Now, please accept this. It should
be enough to compensate for your work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hehe, no need to panic, I've prepared
it properly. Here, take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0028
rows.name:
The rare resources brought into NLA
transform into various forms and
become the means to protect the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0029
rows.name:
Please continue to make full use of
Frontier Net to mine a lot of resources.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'm counting on you. Because without
capable people like you supporting us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016501_MSG0031
rows.name:
Even the greatest combat specialists
wouldn't be able to keep fighting against
external enemies in this remote land.[ST:wait ]
